flavor_text: Twisted cord and river stone for unsteady hunts.
prompt_item_description: A narrow sling of twisted root fiber uses a shallow leather cup and uneven split cords. River-polished pebbles are tied into the cord ends as crude counterweights. flavor_text: Its pouch tears often but still finds soft throats.
